# BP-116 positive variant: Echo returns an error variable after a JSON error.
lang: go
file: BP-116-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: echo
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
)

func remove(c echo.Context) error {
	dbErr := removeRecord()
	if dbErr != nil {
		c.JSON(404, map[string]string{"error": "missing"})
		return dbErr
	}
	return nil
}

func removeRecord() error { return nil }
